arts.ttl: Leicester 'too passive' in West Ham defeat - Van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Leicester City manager Ruud van Nistelrooy says his side were "too passive" in their 2-0 defeat at West Ham United.

arts.ttl: West Ham beat Leicester to claim back-to-back victories
arts.sum: Leicester picked up what seemed like a vital 3-1 win over West Ham in the reverse fixture back in December in Ruud van Nistelrooy ’s first match in charge, but the Foxes were devoid of energy and ideas this time around. West Ham United made it back-to-back Premier League wins by seeing off struggling Leicester City 2-0 at the London Stadium on Thursday.
West Ham boss Graham Potter is delighted with his side's 2-0 win against struggling Leicester City in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: West Ham fans say player with just five Premier League starts this season was ‘unreal’ against Leicester
arts.sum: West Ham United have pulled themselves further away from the Premier League’s bottom three thanks to a 2-0 win over struggling Leicester City on Thursday...

arts.ttl: West Ham pile pressure on struggling Leicester
arts.sum: West Ham beat Premier League strugglers Leicester City 2-0 at the London Stadium on Thursday thanks to a early strike from Tomas Soucek on his 30th birthday and an own goal just before halftime.

arts.ttl: Soucek extends West Ham’s revival and Van Nistelrooy’s Leicester woe
arts.athr: John Brewin at the London Stadium
arts.sum: It has been a midweek of Premier League certainties being secured at both top and bottom. Place Leicester in the certainty category. Defeat at West Ham extended Leicester’s doomed, zombified lurch towards relegation to 11 defeats in 12, 11 from 16 since Ruud van Nistelrooy replaced Steve Cooper in November. If Cooper was the wrong man at the wrong club then so is the Dutchman. Perhaps no manager had a chance with the squad Leicester assembled to attempt survival. Graham Potter, previously linked with Leicester, has meanwhile restored order to West Ham. Jarrod Bowen made things happen for both first-half goals, involved in the move for the first from Tomas Soucek, the second an own goal from Jannik Vestergaard the Hammers captain’s zest had enforced. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: West Ham 2-0 Leicester: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Foxes fall deeper into trouble
arts.sum: West Ham United coast to a 2-0 victory against Leicester City in the Premier League at the London Stadium on a comfortable night for the home side.

arts.ttl: Report: West Ham reignite interest in 46-goal striker they missed out on for a bargain in the summer
arts.sum: West Ham are once again setting their sights on strengthening their attacking options, with renewed interest in Porto striker Samuel Omorodion Aghehowa ahead of the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Leicester’s miserable run continues with limp loss at West Ham
arts.sum: Tomas Soucek was gifted a goal on his 30th birthday and Jannik Vestergaard scored an own goal.

arts.ttl: West Ham unchanged for Leicester visit
arts.sum: The 28-year-old England international leads the Hammers again at London Stadium, seeking to add to the three goals and two assists he has registered in seven career Premier League appearances against tonight’s opponents. Head Coach Graham Potter has named an unchanged starting XI from the West Ham United team who beat Arsenal on Saturday for Thursday’s Premier League home fixture with Leicester City.
